title: Files Gallery disappointment
excerpt: The files gallery is a disappointment. Filters don’t work on group files. Screen just flickers and no change despite files being sorted in groups. This is an expensive product and I’m hoping this can be resolved …or I sw…

posts.author: gmh_2001 (Gethin Hooper)
posts.cookedHtml: The files gallery is a disappointment. Filters don’t work on group files. Screen just flickers and no change despite files being sorted in groups. This is an expensive product and I’m hoping this can be resolved …or I switch to Shotgrid which is more expensive still but dedicated to graphics professionals…
